scripts.build: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && vitest run
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @picket/core build && pnpm --filter @picket/query build && tsc -p tsconfig.json --noEmit
